promoted_facts.fact: Jury trial waiver is irrevocable and mutual (Article 21:3 of FA)
Arby's has broad self-help rights including entering premises without trespass liability (Article 15:5)
ARG management fee nearly doubled from $66.4M (2024) to $122.8M (2025)
ARG stockholders' deficit of -$267.9M driven by $380M note receivable from parent
ARG operating income declined from $221.2M (2023) to $94.9M (2025) — 57% decline
ARG impairment charges of $9.0M in 2025 (restaurant-level impairment)
ARG debt maturity concentration: $773.4M due in 2027
Minimum advertising expenditure 5.2% while AFA Rate Increase is in effect; reverts to 4.2% if reduced
Contract assets of $32.3M related to 2025 strategic incentive program (new)
If no satisfactory amendment found, Arby's may terminate FA upon payment of franchise fee only (no interest/penalty)
